title: sqlite-vec requires explicit go-sqlite3 import for linking
context: src/core/inference/llm unit tests failed with extensive linker errors (undefined reference to sqlite3_*)
content: When using github.com/asg017/sqlite-vec-go-bindings/cgo, the package must also import github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 (even as a blank import) to ensure SQLite C symbols are available to the linker. Without this, sqlite-vec cannot find the underlying SQLite functions it depends on.
